title: Docstring hygiene in benchmark fixtures
description: Add Sphinx-style docstrings to public functions in benchmark fixture scripts without altering behavior.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added Sphinx-style docstrings for public fixture generators in tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py (generate_single_project, generate_multi_project).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Public functions in benchmark fixture scripts include Sphinx-style docstrings; behavior unchanged.
